testCases.action: Verify Dashboard loads and displays KPIs: Active Fundings, Current Funding $, Potential Commissions, Earned Commissions
Verify Funding Pipeline stages display (Client Onboarding, Submitted, With Funders, Approved, Funded)
Verify sidebar menu items: Dashboard, Companies, Partner Agencies, Clients, Fundings, Pitch Decks, Messages, Support Emails, Commissions, Bills, Partner Inquiries, Settings, Reports & Ideas
Click each sidebar menu item to verify routes load without errors
Verify user role displays as backend_user
Navigate to Companies menu from sidebar
Enter company name (e.g., Test Corp Inc)
Submit and verify company is created and visible in Companies list
Navigate to Partner Agencies menu from sidebar
Click 'Add Partner Agency' or equivalent button
Enter partner agency name (e.g., Test Funding Partners)
Submit and verify partner agency is created and visible in list
Navigate to Clients menu from sidebar
Submit and verify client is created
Click on client to open their profile
Verify Personal Information section (name, email, phone)
Click 'Next' or 'Continue' to Business Information section
Enter business type (Sole Proprietor, LLC, S-Corp, C-Corp, etc.)
Verify checklist of required documents (bank statements, tax returns, etc.)
Navigate to Fundings menu from sidebar
Verify funding job appears in funding list with status 'Client Onboarding'
Click on funding job to open details
Click 'Sign Contract' or navigate to e-signature flow
Verify signature pad or signing interface loads
Complete e-signature (draw signature or type name)
Verify contract is marked as signed
Navigate to funding job created in Phase 4
Select a test PDF file (must be PDF)
Verify uploaded document displays in document list
As Employee, review each uploaded document
Verify both documents show approved status
Verify funding status remains or progresses to 'With Funders'
As Employee, navigate to the funding job from Phase 4
Select a funder (or create one if needed)
Verify funding status changes to 'With Funders'
Verify Funder dashboard displays available funding applications
Locate the funding job from Phase 4 in available applications
Click to open funding job details
Review all submitted documents and information
Verify client sees their fundings list
Locate the funding job from Phase 4
Click on funding to view details
Verify all funding information displays correctly
Verify contract is visible and marked as signed
Verify funding status (Submitted, With Funders, Approved, Funded) displays
Verify new document appears in document list
Verify company clients list displays (should include client from Phase 3)
Click on a client to view their details
Click on a funding to view details
Verify company can view all funding information
Verify company can update company information
Verify funder KPIs display: Deal Count, AUM, Approval Rate, etc.
Verify list of pending funding applications displays
Click on an application to view details
Verify all application documents and information display
Navigate to Portfolio or Approved Deals
Verify funding details and timeline display correctly
Verify list of referred clients displays (should include client from Phase 3 if assigned)
Click on a client to view referral details
Verify client information and fundings display
Verify commission calculations are correct based on approved fundings
Verify commission status (Pending, Approved, Paid) displays
Verify partner agency can update contact information
Verify portal uses 'Partner Agency' terminology (not ISO)
As Employee, navigate to a funding job and verify all information displays
Logout and login as Client, verify same funding shows same information
Logout and login as Company Agent, verify company fundings display
Verify all roles see consistent funding status and document information
Test commission calculations: Employee can view commissions for fundings
Verify Partner Agency commission matches employee records
Test notification delivery: Approve a funding job as Employee
Verify all affected roles (Client, Company, Funder, Partner Agency) receive notifications
Test data visibility: Verify Client cannot see other clients' fundings
Verify Partner Agency can only see their referred clients
Verify Company Agent can only see their company's clients
Attempt login with invalid email - verify error message displays
Attempt login with incorrect password - verify error message displays
Attempt login with empty fields - verify error message displays
Create a client and attempt to create duplicate with same email - verify error handling
Upload a non-PDF file when PDF is required - verify error or rejection
Upload an oversized file - verify file size validation
Create a funding job with invalid funding amount (negative or zero) - verify error
Create a funding job with invalid term length - verify error
Attempt to approve documents without uploading all required docs - verify error
Attempt to generate contract without completing onboarding - verify error or notification
Logout from one role and attempt to access another role's dashboard using browser back button - verify proper redirect
Test session timeout - login and wait for session expiration, verify redirect to login
Verify Total Leads card shows value
Verify Active Leads card shows value
Verify Partner Agencies card shows value
Create new lead with Name, Email, Phone
Verify new lead appears with New status
Create new company with Name, Address, Phone
Verify Partner Agency appears in list
Verify company filter in leads view
Verify Partner Agency filter in leads view
Open Active Calls or Dialer from COMMUNICATION
Verify company can view assigned leads
Add note to lead from company portal
Update lead status from company view
Verify partner can view assigned leads
View lead details from partner view
Update lead status from partner view
Create and qualify a lead in backend portal (status: Converted)
Login to SPV Matrix test portal
Verify duplicate detection or allows it
Attempt to access unauthorized portal as backend_user
Verify RLS: superadmin can manage organizations
Search for a client by name
Verify partner can be assigned to jobs
On a pending step, click Upload
Select a PDF or image file
Navigate to Partner Agency login URL
Verify partner can see job steps
Navigate to Service Provider login URL
Attempt login with old superadmin password
Leave email blank and click Login
Leave password blank and click Login
Try SQL injection in email field
Attempt login after account locked (if applicable)
Create SPV job without selecting client
Leave notes field blank on completion
Try to create client with same email
Try to create company with same name
Assign same employee twice to one job
Try to create job with same reference number
Upload file larger than size limit
Upload file with special characters in name

phases.name: 1. Overview — How the Four Sites Connect

testCases.action: Log in to LeadCRM as lead.employee
Create new lead with name, email, phone, company
Log in to Sav.Fund as sav.employee
Verify exported client appears in Sav.Fund client list
Client name, email, phone match LeadCRM data
Complete funding application workflow in Sav.Fund

phases.name: 4. Flow B: LeadCRM → SPV Matrix (SPV Path)

testCases.action: Log in to LeadCRM as lead.employee
Create new lead with name, email, phone, company
Log in to SPV Matrix as spv.employee
Verify exported client appears in SPV Matrix
Client data matches (name, email, phone, company)
Create SPV job for exported client
SPV job created successfully with client association

phases.name: 5. Flow C: Matrix 2.0 — CommandCenter Organization Replication

testCases.action: Log in to CommandCenter as cc.superadmin
Identify organization with IS_MATRIX flag = true
Select target sites (LeadCRM, Sav.Fund, SPV Matrix)
Log into LeadCRM and verify organization appears
Log into Sav.Fund and verify organization appears
Log into SPV Matrix and verify organization appears
Log in to CommandCenter as cc.superadmin
Create cross-site user with global role
Log in to LeadCRM with cross-site user
Verify user can see assigned organization data
Log in to Sav.Fund with same user
Verify user can see same organization data in Sav.Fund
Verify user cannot access data from other organizations (RLS)
Client names match exactly between source and target site
Role assignments are correct and consistent
Export non-qualified lead from LeadCRM → Should fail with error message
Export lead that already exists in target site → Duplicate handling works correctly
Replicate organization without IS_MATRIX flag → Should fail or be rejected
Export lead with missing required fields → System validates and prevents export
User from LeadCRM attempts to view Sav.Fund data of another org → RLS blocks access
Replicate to offline site → Error handling and retry mechanism works
Export lead with special characters in name/email → Data transfers without corruption
